name: ctx_value_string_exists
description: context contains the key with a string value, should return the value

name: ctx_value_string_missing_key
description: context does not contain the key, should return empty string

name: ctx_value_string_non_string_value
description: context contains the key but with a non-string value, should return empty string

name: ctx_value_string_empty_value
description: context contains the key with an empty string, should return empty string

name: extract_anthropic_metadata_nil
description: nil metadata input, should return nil

name: extract_anthropic_metadata_with_user_id
description: metadata with user_id set, should return map with user_id entry

name: extract_anthropic_metadata_empty_user_id
description: metadata with empty user_id, should return nil
